parameters.query:
select   su.rs_company as pwn_nm,
  su.scnt as cnt
  from 
(select rs_company, count(rs_company) scnt from sw_sm_order a LEFT JOIN sw_sm_reseller ssr ON a.rs_id = ssr.rs_id  where m_rs_id ='RS-0000000051'
and a.shipping_due_date >= date(now())
and a.shipping_due_date < date(now() + interval 1 day)
and a.exp_start_date = '0000-00-00 00:00:00'
and a.od_claim_type = ''
group by ssr.rs_company  ) su ;

SELECT      
  oom.depot_cd,
  wdm2.depot_nm,
  oom.pwn_cd,
  opm.pwn_nm,
  SUM(CASE WHEN oom.invoice_transf_yn = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_cnt
FROM        om_order_m oom
LEFT JOIN   wm_depot_m wdm2
ON          wdm2.depot_cd = oom.depot_cd
LEFT JOIN   om_pwn_m opm
ON          opm.pwn_cd = oom.pwn_cd
WHERE       oom.mall_acc_sno IS NOT NULL
  AND         oom.mall_cd = 'MAL00038'
  AND         (oom.gift_yn != 'Y' OR oom.gift_yn IS NULL)
  AND         oom.od_state = '01'
  AND         oom.claim_hv_yn = 'N'
  AND         oom.reg_type = '03'
  AND         oom.dlvr_div_cd ='03'
  AND         EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM wm_out_m wom
  WHERE wom.od_sno = oom.od_sno
  )
AND oom.reg_dtm >= '{{ $json.start_dtm }}'
AND oom.reg_dtm <  '{{ $json.end_dtm }}'
GROUP by oom.depot_cd, oom.pwn_cd
ORDER by oom.depot_cd, oom.pwn_cd
